title: Bring external ecosystem surfaces from reachable to operational
details: NuSyQ-Hub is reachable on :8000 but reports system.status=off / overall_status=unknown. SimulatedVerse is not present as a runnable local image. RimWorld container is up but the actual game assets are missing from /rimworld/game. Produce a concrete activation checklist and validate each dependency needed for a true full-stack bring-up.
